prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年兰州大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2331名、3148名、2981名、2517名、3448名，整体呈波动上升趋势，近两年波动幅度加大；2025年位 次3448名较2024年大幅后移约931名，为近五年最低水平，反映出当年报考热度有所降温；该校在海南省招生计划2021–2023年均为19人，2024年增至20人，2025 年增至21人；2026年招生计划为综合类22人、医学类2人，合计24人，较2025年增加3人，扩招约14.3%，招生名额增加对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州 大学为教育部直属985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第40名，近年排名稳定在38–40名区间，属于中坚985高校，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面，硕士毕业生致谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校等事件展现人文关怀，提升学校形象；抖音热度排名第53位，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等偏 上，报考关注度有所升温；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理较为稳定；草学A+、生态学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-，共5个A-及以上学 科，其中2个A+学科，在生态、草业科学等领域具有全国领先水平，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、法学等热门专业持续受追捧；海南省考生总数2 021–2025年分别为52977、55945、61728、65969、67408人，2026年约78000人，较2025年增加约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年扩招约14.3%对竞争的缓解作用、声誉偏正面与抖音较热对报考关注度的提升、以及本省考生规模扩大约15.7%带来的竞争加 剧，多因素相互对冲后预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约3694名，区间3194–4194名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Lanzhou University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2331, 3148, 2981, 2517, and 3448 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend with increased volatility in recent years; the 2025 ranking of 3448 dropped significantly by about 931 places compared to 2024, marking the lowest level in five years, reflecting a cooling of application enthusiasm that year; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 19 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 20 in 2024, and to 21 in 2025; the 2026 enrollment plan is 22 students for comprehensive category and 2 for medical category, totaling 24, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 14.3%, which somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 40th, with stable rankings in the 38–40 range in recent years, placing it among the mid-tier 985 universities with strong comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, with events such as graduate students thanking the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus showcasing humanistic care and enhancing the university's image; its Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd, rated as relatively hot, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, indicating rising application attention; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff line gaps or crashes, indicating stable application psychology; it has 5 A- or above disciplines including A+ in Grassland Science, A+ in Ecology, A- in Chemistry, A- in Geography, and A- in Biology, with two A+ disciplines, leading nationally in fields such as ecology and grassland science, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Law continue to be highly sought after; the total number of examinees in Hainan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 52977, 55945, 61728, 65969, and 67408 respectively, with an estimated 78000 in 2026, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the examinee pool and intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in 2025 rankings as a baseline, the alleviation of competition due to an enrollment expansion of about 14.3% in 2026, the increase in application attention from a slightly positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin presence, and the intensified competition from an approximately 15.7% increase in the province's examinee population, multiple factors offset each other, leading to an expected slight forward shift in the minimum admission ranking for 2026 compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3694, with a range of 3194–4194.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3194–4194, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 3200), focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Law; if the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 4000), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission probability.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 兰州大学在海南省医学类仅2021年有单独录取数据，当年最低位次为3267，总计划4人，仅设临床医学类（含临床医学、医学影像学、麻醉学、儿科学）一个专业大类。2022至20 25年海南省未单独公布兰州大学医学类录取位次，故无法获取完整序列。2026年医学类招生计划大幅缩减至2人，仅保留临床医学专业，缩招幅度达50%，选科要求从'化学、生物' 调整为'物理、化学'，扩大了可报考的生源范围。计划大幅缩减将加剧竞争，推动录取位次上行（位次数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程及双一流建设高校，办学层次高，综合实力强。作为西北地区顶尖高校，其医学学科（尤其是临床医学）具有 较高的学术声誉和培养质量，在全国范围内认可度良好，对有志于医学的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学更是医学门类中最受追捧的专业之一。兰州大学地处甘肃省兰州市，地理位置相对偏远，但作为985高校，其医学专业对 海南考生的吸引力依然较强。2026年海南省医学类仅招2人，招生规模极小，进一步推高了竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，2026年兰州大学在海南省医学类最低录取位次预计为3167名，较2021年（3267名）小幅上升约100名。由于招生计划大幅缩减且选科门槛调整，竞争加剧导致位次 前移。波动区间为3017至3317名，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Lanzhou University's medical category in Hainan Province only has separate admission data for 2021, with the lowest ranking of 3267, a total plan of 4 students, and only one major category: Clinical Medicine (including Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging, Anesthesiology, and Pediatrics). From 2022 to 2025, Hainan Province did not separately publish the admission rankings for Lanzhou University's medical category, so a complete sequence cannot be obtained. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan was significantly reduced to 2 students, retaining only the Clinical Medicine major, a reduction of 50%. The subject requirements changed from 'Chemistry, Biology' to 'Physics, Chemistry', expanding the pool of eligible applicants. The significant reduction in the plan will intensify competition, pushing the admission ranking upward (ranking number decreases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with a high level of education and strong comprehensive strength. As a top university in the northwest region, its medical disciplines (especially Clinical Medicine) have high academic reputation and training quality, with good recognition nationwide, strongly attracting students interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide, with Clinical Medicine being one of the most sought-after majors in the medical field. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, a relatively remote location, but as a 985 university, its medical majors still have strong appeal to Hainan candidates. In 2026, Hainan Province's medical category only enrolls 2 students, an extremely small scale, further increasing competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the lowest admission ranking for Lanzhou University's medical category in Hainan Province in 2026 is expected to be 3167, a slight increase of about 100 places compared to 2021 (3267). Due to the significant reduction in enrollment plan and adjustment of subject requirements, intensified competition leads to a forward shift in ranking. The fluctuation range is 3017 to 3317, and it is recommended that candidates plan their applications reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Lanzhou University's medical category in Hainan Province only enrolls for Clinical Medicine (2 students), with an extremely small scale and intense competition. Candidates within the predicted ranking range can boldly aim for it, but need to prepare backup plans. Since there is only one major, it is recommended to use Lanzhou University's Clinical Medicine as a Tier 1 sprint choice, while preparing medical majors from other universities as Tier 2 and Tier 3 safety options.
